mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate of Jacob B. Lawrence
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate of Jacob B. Lawrence M.J. Lawrence, Widow Martha A. Martin, Daughter Laura Basham, Daughter James I. Lawrence's Children: Nannie, E.F., Noah B. Della, Hubert L., and Mars E. Lawrence Mary Lawrence, Their Guardian L.M. Lawrence G.L. Lawrence, Administrator Recorded in Ledger Book 5, page 124, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
